seoTitle: How to Group Items in Squarespace for Cleaner Layouts
metaDescription: Learn how to group items in Squarespace to organize your website design, showcase collections, and improve user engagement.
intro: Grouping items in Squarespace helps you organize content like product collections, services, or blog categories into a cleaner, more navigable layout. This tutorial walks through the grouping process and best practices for keeping your site organized and visually appealing.

steps.heading: Understand the importance of grouping in web design
steps.body: Grouping related items together makes it easier for visitors to navigate your site and find the content or products they're looking for.

steps.heading: Follow the step-by-step grouping process
steps.body: Use Squarespace's tools to group items together, following the tutorial's walkthrough for organizing your content.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for grouping items
steps.body: Keep groupings logical and consistent, whether you're organizing products, services, or blog posts, so the layout stays easy to scan.

steps.heading: Review real-world business examples
steps.body: Look at how businesses use grouped items to present collections or categories in a cohesive, easy-to-navigate way.

steps.heading: Explore automation for efficiency
steps.body: Consider integration options that help manage grouped items automatically, keeping updates consistent across pages.

faq.question: Why should I group items on my Squarespace site?
faq.answer: Grouping creates a more organized, aesthetically pleasing layout that helps visitors navigate and find information more easily.

faq.question: Can I group blog posts as well as products?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial notes that grouping works for product collections, services, and blog categories alike.

faq.question: Is this feature useful for small businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, the video is aimed at personal projects, small businesses, and large enterprises alike.

faq.question: Can automation help manage grouped items over time?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial mentions integration options for automation that support smoother updates and consistency.

faq.question: Is this beginner-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial provides an easy-to-follow guide for beginners along with advanced tips for professionals.
